title: Cradock’s rising star shines at national science fair
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRADOCK NEWS - Seventeen-year-old Buhle Hlonela Goniwe, a learner from JA Calata Senior Secondary School in Lingelihle, Nxuba (Cradock), is making his hometown proud in more than one field.","html":"CRADOCK NEWS - Seventeen-year-old Buhle Hlonela Goniwe, a learner from JA Calata Senior Secondary School in Lingelihle, Nxuba (Cradock), is making his hometown proud in more than one field."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"His latest achievement is a silver medal in the agriculture category at the Eskom Expo International Science Fair (ISF), held from 6 to 10 October at Emperors Palace in Kempton Park."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The competition brought together the brightest young scientists from South Africa, Lesotho, Namibia, Zimbabwe, Ireland, India and Russia.","html":"The competition brought together the brightest young scientists from South Africa, Lesotho, Namibia, Zimbabwe, Ireland, India and Russia."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Goniwe’s innovative project explored how plants can be grown without soil, using organic, nutrient-rich solutions instead – a sustainable method that could transform agriculture in water-scarce areas.","html":"Goniwe’s innovative project explored how plants can be grown without soil, using organic, nutrient-rich solutions instead – a sustainable method that could transform agriculture in water-scarce areas."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Eskom Expo spokesperson Jevanne Gibbs praised the finalists, saying they “represent the country’s top young scientists who demonstrate exceptional talent and passion for science, technology, engineering, mathematics, and innovation”.","html":"Eskom Expo spokesperson Jevanne Gibbs praised the finalists, saying they “represent the country’s top young scientists who demonstrate exceptional talent and passion for science, technology, engineering, mathematics, and innovation”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A total of 30 gold, 77 silver, and 131 bronze medals were awarded during the grand ceremony.","html":"A total of 30 gold, 77 silver, and 131 bronze medals were awarded during the grand ceremony."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Eskom Expo executive director Parthy Chetty congratulated participants, encouraging them to keep asking questions and exploring. \"Your ideas matter,” she told them.","html":"Eskom Expo executive director Parthy Chetty congratulated participants, encouraging them to keep asking questions and exploring. \"Your ideas matter,” she told them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Beyond his scientific achievements, Goniwe is also a model and pageant titleholder, having been crowned Mr Tourism SA and Mr Junior King of the World 2025.","html":"Beyond his scientific achievements, Goniwe is also a model and pageant titleholder, having been crowned Mr Tourism SA and Mr Junior King of the World 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Earlier this year, he also won a gold medal at a regional Eskom Expo event and received a R64 000 bursary from Rhodes University, where he plans to study in 2026.","html":"Earlier this year, he also won a gold medal at a regional Eskom Expo event and received a R64 000 bursary from Rhodes University, where he plans to study in 2026."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Cradock’s rising star shines at national science fair
